## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

The problem this solves or the feature it adds.

## How

Technical approach (for non-trivial changes).

## Testing

How you verified this change works:
- [ ] Ran a scan against a test target
- [ ] Tested affected module(s) individually
- [ ] Verified no regressions in CLI output
- [ ] Updated documentation (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (ES Modules, async/await)
- [ ] I have added JSDoc comments for new/changed functions
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
